rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ELMO LEE CARTER
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/27/23. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) Still no courtesy copy of the amended petition has been received by the examiner. [LRSF 2.7 B. and 14.7 B. and C.] (Courtesy copies are file stamped, single-sided, hard copies.) In hopes of not continuing this again, it was reviewed online as a one-time courtesy. Elvin Carter as the Successor Trustee of the Hattie Ross Living Trust is the petitioner. If this estate holds assets that another party claims, the party claiming such assets must file a petition pursuant to Probate Code Section 850(a)(3)(B). (2) The proof of service filed on 9/15/23 did not show the correct, full caption of the pleading. In any event, notice of a petition under Probate Code Section 851 requires a different mandatory Judicial Council form Notice of Hearing (DE-115) to be served after the 850 petition is filed. If this petition is not withdrawn and a new 850 petition is not filed by 11/17/23, an appearance will be required on 11/27/23. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. NB: In addition to the requirements of CRC 2.111 and 7.102, all pleadings must also show the name and REPRESENTATIVE CAPACITY, if any, of the party for whom the attorney is appearing, e.g., John Jones, Executor. "Petitioner" or "Respondent" alone is not sufficient. [LRSF 14.15 A.]

rulings.Case Title: GUARDIANSHIP OF JASON KENNETH CHEUNG
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/13/23. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) An amendment was filed on 9/19/23, which was not at least 15 days before this hearing. (2) Notice must include the full instructions for remote appearance procedures attached to the Notice of Hearing. [LRSF 14.1 D.6.] Please review the Probate Division's Calendar Information on the Court's website. (3) The proof of service filed on 9/18/23 lists various purportedly filed pleadings to be heard on 10/2/23, but there was no such pleading captioned "Petition for Order Re Deposit of Money Belonging to Minor." Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by 11/3/23. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. When papers are not filed electronically, each paper presented for filing must contain two prepunched normal-sized holes, centered 21/2 inches apart and 5/8 inch from the top of the paper. [CRC 2.115.] This includes proposed orders.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ROBERT WHITE ANBIAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (421 Lyon Street, San Francisco, Ca 94117)
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required, despite the following issues (e-mailed to counsel on 09/25/2023): 1) The reported sale was made (offer/bid accepted and returned to Court for confirmation) on 06/28/2023, BEFORE the 08/11/2023 deadline specified in the published notice for submitting offers/bids, and thus failed to comply with Probate Code section 10306(a) ("A private sale of real property may not be made before the day stated in the notice of sale as the day on or after which the sale will be made"); see also LRSF 14.31B ("No offer can be accepted until the date on or after the time for making bids expires."). 2) The proof of service on file does not show notice of this hearing was given to Karim Fanadka, the buyer/original bidder. See section 10308(c). Other issues include: 1) No proposed order has been received or lodged. 2) Item 1c of the petition: The percentage and base amount must be stated. 3) Item 1d: The first box must be unchecked, if no additional bond is required. 4) Item 3b: The appraisal value is incorrect and overstated. 5) Item 3c: The reappraisal value is incorrect and overstated. 6) Item 3d: The first box must be checked. 7) Item 5b: The published notice did not state that the exclusive listing was granted. LRSF 14.31(B). 8) Item 6b: The box must be checked, if no additional bond is required. 9) Item 9b: Please provide a brief explanation as to why the sale is to the advantage of the estate and in the best interest of the interested persons. 10) Item 10: The minimum overbid calculation is incorrect. 11) Attachment 2e: The legal description appears incorrect and completely different. A copy of the vesting deed previously filed with the Court should be reviewed. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JEFFREY CRAIG
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The Court to determine if the petition should be taken off calendar for failure to address issues. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1 D. for information on remote appearances. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARGARET ANN BURY
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing for the sole purpose of admitting the will. No appearance required. Status on filing an inventory and appraisal is set for 02/05/2024. Status on close of the estate is set for 11/18/2024.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF WILLIAM T. HAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Inventory And Appraisal
rulings.Rulings: OFF CALENDAR

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DIANE M. OSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. Status of closing the estate is set for 10/14/24. A petition for final distribution or a report of status with a petition requesting additional time for estate administration must be filed at least two weeks before 10/14/24. Appearance will be required on 10/14/24 if no petition has been filed.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF WANG CHANG NG
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/13/23 for failure to address issues. All required documents to be filed by 10/30/23.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MEI CHUI CHEW
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing for the sole purpose of admitting the will. No appearance required. Status hearing on close of the estate is set for 11/18/2024.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FIKRET S. ALISIC
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. Although item 5a(2) of the petition was not answered, the Court deems the second paragraph of Attachment 7 as sufficient to assume that Decedent was not survived by issue of a predeceased child. Item 13 of the petition was also unanswered. (Only one courtesy copy of filed papers needs to be provided.)
